news.headline: Macy’s, Inc. will report Q3 2024 earnings on Dec 11, 2024. Call with CEO & CFO at 8:00 a.m. EST. Public can access webcast.
news.summary: Macy’s, Inc. (NYSE: M) is set to announce its third quarter 2024 sales and earnings figures on December 11, 2024. The financial results will be revealed during a call and webcast at 8:00 a.m. EST that will involve Macy’s, Inc.’s Chairman and CEO Tony Spring and COO/CFO Adrian Mitchell. The live webcast and related presentation will be available for the general public and media audience.

news.headline: Valero Energy Corp. (NYSE: VLO) to report Q4 & full-year 2024 earnings on Jan 30, 2025, with a 10:00 a.m. ET conference call. Join on investorvalero.com.
news.summary: Valero Energy Corporation, a leading energy company listed on NYSE as VLO, based in San Antonio, Texas, is set to hold a conference call on January 30, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. ET. The purpose of the call is to discuss the earnings results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024, set to be released on the same day, and offer insights into the company's operations. Those interested can tune in to the webcast on Valero's Investor Relations website at investorvalero.com. Valero Energy Corporation is known for its significant presence in the energy sector.

news.headline: VICI Properties prices $750 million senior unsecured notes at 5.125% due 2031, issued at 99.643% of par value. Interest payable biannually.
news.summary: In a recent update, VICI Properties Inc. revealed that its subsidiary, VICI Properties L.P., has successfully priced a public offering of $750 million in total of 5.125% senior unsecured notes due 2031. These notes, issued at 99.643% of par value, are set to mature on November 15, 2031. Interest on the notes will be paid in cash biannually on May 15 and November 15, with the first payment scheduled for May. This move aims to secure funds for future ventures and operations, marking a significant financial development for VICI Properties.

news.headline: Olin Corporation's Investor Day on Dec 12, 2024, from 9am-12pm (ET) with Ken Lane, President & CEO, and Todd Slater, SVP & CFO.
news.summary: In Clayton, Missouri, on December 9, 2024, Olin Corporation (NYSE: OLN) disclosed its plans to hold an Investor Day on December 12 from 9:00am to 12:00pm (Eastern Time). Ken Lane, the President & CEO, and Todd Slater, the Senior Vice President & CFO, will be leading the event alongside other executive team members.

news.headline: TETWP marks 20 years battling breast cancer, starting as idea, now powerful grassroots campaign.
news.summary: In NAPA, California, on December 9, 2024, Tough Enough to Wear Pink (TETWP) marks a momentous occasion as the grassroots campaign commemorates a significant anniversary. Initially just a daring concept, TETWP has evolved into a monumental force within the western industry's fight against breast cancer. The campaign, known for its powerful impact, has mobilized numerous individuals to join the cause, bringing hope and support to countless individuals.

news.headline: Crane Company promotes Alejandro Alcala to COO, overseeing all business segments and Crane Business System.
news.summary: Stamford, Connecticut - Crane Company (NYSE: CR), a leading industrial manufacturing and technology firm, has appointed Alejandro (Alex) Alcala as the new Chief Operating Officer (COO). Effective immediately, Alcala will be responsible for overseeing all Crane business segments and the Crane Business System organization. Max H. Mitchell, Chairman, President, and CEO of Crane Company, expressed his confidence in Alcala's capabilities for the role.

news.headline: Asana to present at Barclays 22nd Annual Global Technology Conference on Dec 11, 2024 at 8:40am PT. Leading enterprise work management platform with over 150.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Asana, Inc., a prominent enterprise work management platform listed on NYSE as ASAN and LTSE as ASAN, shared news that its executives will be speaking at the Barclays 22nd Annual Global Technology Conference on December 11, 2024, at 8:40 a.m. PT / 11:40 a.m. ET. This event will be broadcasted live on Asana’s website at https://investors.asana.com. Asana is known for connecting work to goals as a leading platform in its field, with over 150 being part of its network.

news.headline: WisdomTree named in the 2024 Best Places to Work in Money Management list by Pensions & Investments for fifth year.
news.summary: WisdomTree has been recognized as one of the Best Places to Work in Money Management for 2024 by Pensions & Investments. This marks the fifth consecutive year that WisdomTree has received this honor.

news.headline: Universal Display Corporation in Ewing, N.J., recognized by Newsweek for its responsibility, making America's Most Responsible Companies 2025 list.
news.summary: A company based in Ewing, New Jersey, Universal Display Corporation, has been recognized for its responsible practices by being included in Newsweek's list of America's Most Responsible Companies for the year 2025. This acknowledgment highlights the company's commitment to ethical and sustainable operations.

news.headline: Greif debuts ModCan™ at Pack-Expo, a modular packaging solution to enhance shipping safety and efficiency. NYSE: GEF, GEF.B
news.summary: In Delaware, Ohio, on December 9, 2024, Greif, Inc. revealed the introduction of ModCan™ at the Pack-Expo event in Chicago. Greif, Inc., a prominent player in industrial packaging products and services with listings on NYSE under GEF and GEF.B, presented this novel modular packaging solution. ModCan™ aims to enhance effectiveness and safety in the transportation and storage of various materials and waste.

news.headline: Japan Smaller Capitalization Fund, Inc. announces $0.3118 in ordinary income distribution.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the economy grew by 3.5% in the third quarter of the fiscal year, exceeding expectations. This growth was driven by a surge in consumer spending, which rose by 5.2%, the highest increase in the past five years. Additionally, business investment saw a 7% increase, reflecting growing confidence in the market. Unemployment also fell to 4.1%, the lowest rate in a decade. These positive indicators suggest a strong and stable economic outlook for the upcoming months.

news.headline: Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE:TOL) releases FY 2024 Q4 results as the leading luxury home builder, Oct 31, 2024.
news.summary: Fort Washington, Pennsylvania - As of December 9, 2024, Toll Brothers, Inc. disclosed its fourth-quarter outcomes for the period ending on October 31, 2024. Toll Brothers, Inc., recognized as the prominent constructor of upscale residences in the United States, shared this information. The company's stock trades on the NYSE under the symbol "TOL," with additional details available on the official website TollBrothers.com.

news.headline: Coherent releases first 100G ZR QSFP28-DCO to operate over -40°C to +85°C. #opticalnetworking #CoherentCorp
news.summary: Coherent Corp., a prominent player in high-performance optical networking solutions, has recently revealed the launch and production of the world's inaugural 100G ZR QSFP28 DCO transceiver. This cutting-edge technology is designed to function over the industrial temperature range, spanning from -40°C to +85°C. This release signifies a significant advancement in the field of optical networking, setting a new standard for efficiency and performance.

news.headline: Roche initiating tender offer for Poseida Therapeutics at $9/share in cash plus CVR for up to $4/share.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Roche (SIX: RO, ROG; OTCQX: RHHBY) initiated a tender offer to acquire all outstanding common shares of Poseida Therapeutics, Inc. (Poseida) (NASDAQ: PSTX) for $9.00 per share in cash, with an additional non-tradeable contingent value right (CVR) for potential contingent payments totaling up to $4.00 per share in cash. This offer is part of a merger agreement dated November 25, 2024, involving Roche Holdings, Inc. (a subsidiary of Roche Holding Ltd), Blue Giant Acquisition Corp., and Poseida.

news.headline: Rocket Lab's successful suborbital hypersonic launch tested technology for the Department of Defense. #RKLB #hypersonic
news.summary: In Long Beach, California, Rocket Lab USA, Inc. (Nasdaq: RKLB) reported a successful suborbital mission conducted in November to evaluate hypersonic technology for the Department of Defense. This crucial mission showcased hypersonic test launch abilities via the Multi-Service Advanced Capability Hypersonics Test Bed (MACH-TB) initiative, designed to enhance hypersonic flight trials for the U.S. military. Rocket Lab, renowned for its launch services and space systems globally, continues to be at the forefront of cutting-edge space technology.

news.headline: Manulife warns investors about New York Stock and Bond LLC offering to buy up to 50,000 of its common shares.
news.summary: In a press release dated December 9, 2024, Manulife, a company listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange, New York Stock Exchange, and PSE under the symbols MFC and on SEHK under 945, announced that New York Stock and Bond LLC (New York Stock and Bond) has initiated an unsolicited mini-tender offer. The offer proposes to acquire a maximum of 50,000 common shares of Manulife, which represents less than 0.003% of the total outstanding shares.

news.headline: DiamondRock Hospitality (NYSE: DRH) declares $0.23 per common share Q4 dividend, totaling $0.32 per share for 2024.
news.summary: In Bethesda, Maryland, on December 9, 2024, DiamondRock Hospitality Company (NYSE: DRH) disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly dividend of $0.23 per common share for the fourth quarter of 2024. This brings the total dividends for the year to $0.32 per share.

news.headline: Dover CFO Brad Cerepak to retire on Jan 31, 2025; Chris Woenker, 42, named as successor. Characters: 82
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Dover Corporation (NYSE: DOV) revealed that Brad Cerepak, their Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, will retire on January 31, 2025. Aged 42, Christopher "Chris" Woenker will succeed him as the new Chief Financial Officer.

news.headline: Smartsheet shareholders approve acquisition by Blackstone and Vista Equity Partners, fulfilling shareholder vote condition.
news.summary: Bellevue, Washington-based Smartsheet (NYSE:SMAR) disclosed today that its shareholders have widely voted in favor of the Merger Proposal for the company’s intended purchase by funds handled by Blackstone and Vista Equity Partners, marking a significant milestone. This acquisition was first revealed in September 2024. The approval from shareholders meets the critical condition of their vote for finalizing the acquisition deal. The merger is anticipated to bring substantial value to the company and its stakeholders.

news.headline: Chicago Faucet launches HyTronic® TempShield® Series touchless faucets for healthcare/commercial - December 9, 2024.
news.summary: A company based in Des Plaines, Illinois, announced on December 9, 2024, the release of their latest touchless faucets designed for healthcare and commercial facilities. The Chicago Faucet Company, known for its commercial faucets, introduced the HyTronic® TempShield® Series to enhance safety and efficiency in these environments. This new line of faucets aims to provide improved user experience by incorporating touchless technology.

news.headline: Premium Development Inc. completes FIFTEEN luxury apartments in Miami, Florida, obtaining final Certificate of Occupancy.
news.summary: In Miami on December 9, 2024, Premium Development Inc., a renowned real estate developer, celebrated the completion of FIFTEEN Apartments, a high-end residential complex situated at 1420 NW 15 Avenue in Miami, Florida. The company has recently obtained official approval for...

news.headline: Cohen & Steers reports AUM of $91.4 billion on Nov 30, 2024, an increase of $1.7 billion from the previous month.
news.summary: Today, Cohen & Steers, Inc. (NYSE: CNS) announced that their preliminary assets under management totaled $91.4 billion as of November 30, 2024. This marks a $1.7 billion increase from the previous month's assets under management of $89.7 billion as of October 31, 2024. The growth in assets is attributed to...

news.headline: Chicago Atlantic REFI offers 13%+ yield, lower risk than Fed-backed bonds; loan portfolio shows 18% YTM with 4.6% non-accrual loans. Refi's strong growth includes a 32% increase in new loans year-over-year, supported by a $559 million pipeline. Major markets include Maryland (14%), Pennsylvania (12%), and Missouri (10%).
news.summary: Chicago Atlantic REFI, a company in the cannabis finance sector, has received an "Overweight" rating from analyst Pablo Zuanic. The company offers a near 14% dividend yield, providing a less volatile way to invest in the cannabis market. Their loan portfolio has a yield to maturity of over 18%, indicating potential average annual return. Additionally, with only 4.6% of loans in non-accrual status, Chicago Atlantic REFI demonstrates strong risk management. The company's new loans have increased by 32% year-over-year, showing strong growth potential. They have a $559 million pipeline and may benefit from potential cannabis legalization in states like Pennsylvania and Virginia. Key states in their portfolio include Maryland (14%), Pennsylvania (12%), and Missouri (10%).

news.headline: Primaris REIT declares $0.0717 per unit distribution for Dec 2024, totaling $0.86 annually. Payable Jan 15 to holders Dec 31.
news.summary: In Toronto, Primaris Real Estate Investment Trust, traded as PMZ.UN on TSX, shared that the Board of Trustees approved a distribution of $0.0717 per unit for December 2024, totaling $0.86 annually. The dividends will be disbursed on January 15, 2025, to unitholders on record as of December 31, 2024. Primaris is recognized as Canada’s sole REIT concentrating on enclosed shopping centers.

news.headline: Floki and Mastercard introduce a 13-crypto debit card for Europe, part of the trend in crypto firms offering payment solutions.
news.summary: Floki is part of a rising trend of cryptocurrency companies launching regional payment cards, allowing users to utilize their cryptocurrencies for purchases.

news.headline: Lilly announces $15 billion share repurchase program and 15% dividend increase, completed $5 billion buyback.
news.summary: Today, Eli Lilly and Company's board of directors (NYSE: LLY) in Indianapolis announced a fresh $15 billion share repurchase plan. The previous program, which was worth $5 billion, concluded in the final quarter of 2024. This new initiative aims to strengthen the company's position in the market.

news.headline: Healthpeak Properties extends $3 billion revolving credit facility for healthcare real estate, with over $5 billion offered by lender group.
news.summary: Denver-based Healthpeak Properties, Inc. (NYSE: DOC), a key player in healthcare real estate, revealed an update on its financial standing as they renewed and adjusted their $3 billion revolving credit facility. The operating partnership also tweaked existing term loans to align with this credit facility change. The lender group extended generous support, offering potential funding exceeding $5 billion to the company.

news.headline: Casey's General Stores reports Q2 results: Diluted EPS up 14%, net income $181 million, EBITDA $349 million. Same-store sales increase by 4.0%.
news.summary: An announcement was made by Casey’s General Stores, Inc., a prominent convenience store chain in the U.S., regarding its financial performance for the three and six months ending on October 31, 2024. Key highlights include a Diluted EPS of $4.85, showcasing a 14% increase compared to the previous year. Net income saw a rise of 14%, reaching $181 million, while EBITDA stood at $349 million, marking a 14% increase from the same period last year. Additionally, inside same-store sales experienced a notable 4.0% increase.

news.headline: Rubicon appoints Eric Bauer as CFO, effective immediately, replacing Grant Deans. Osman Ahmed, Interim CEO, welcomes the new hire.
news.summary: Rubicon Technologies, Inc., a major provider of technology-driven waste and recycling solutions, has appointed Eric Bauer as its new Chief Financial Officer. Bauer will assume the role immediately. Grant Deans, the former Interim CFO, will transition to the position of Controller under Bauer's leadership. Osman Ahmed, the Interim CEO of Rubicon, expressed enthusiasm about Bauer joining the team in this crucial financial role. Rubicon's stock trades on the OTC market under the ticker symbol RBTC.

news.headline: Commercial Metals Company (NYSE: CMC) to host Q1 FY2025 earnings conference call on Jan 6, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. in Irving, Texas.
news.summary: A company based in Irving, Texas, Commercial Metals Company (NYSE: CMC), will be hosting a live Internet broadcast of its conference call to discuss its first quarter earnings for fiscal 2025. The event is scheduled for Monday, January 6, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. This announcement was made on December 9, 2024.

news.headline: Brookdale Senior Living's November 2024 occupancy increased by 110 basis points to 79.5%. - 78 chars
news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee on December 9, 2024, Brookdale Senior Living Inc. (NYSE: BKD) announced its consolidated occupancy for November 2024. The data for November showed a year-over-year increase of 110 basis points, bringing the November weighted average occupancy to 79.5% in 2024. This shows a positive trend in the company's performance.

news.headline: ONEOK, Inc. to join investor conference, fireside chat at 11 a.m. ET on Dec. 10; event to be webcast on www.oneok.com.
news.summary: In Tulsa, Oklahoma on December 9, 2024, ONEOK, Inc. (NYSE: OKE) will be engaging in an investor conference and hosting a fireside chat at 11 a.m. ET (10 a.m. CT) on Tuesday, December 10. The event will be broadcasted live on ONEOK's website at www.oneok.com.

news.headline: CHOP researchers discover larotrectinib effective in treating infantile fibrosarcoma and solid tumors, potentially replacing chemotherapy.
news.summary: A recent study conducted in Philadelphia on December 9, 2024 revealed that a drug already sanctioned could potentially supplant chemotherapy as the primary treatment for specific cancers. Scientists from Children's Hospital of Philadelphia (CHOP) and the Children's Oncology Group (COG) discovered that larotrectinib, previously approved, showed promising results in treating these cancers. This groundbreaking finding could revolutionize cancer treatment, benefiting a significant number of patients globally.

news.headline: Tim Keating appointed as Senior VP at AMD for Government Relations and Regulatory Affairs on Dec. 09, 2024.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, on December 9, 2024, AMD revealed that Tim Keating will be assuming the role of senior vice president for Government Relations and Regulatory Affairs, starting on the same day. Keating's appointment marks a significant development for the company as they continue to strengthen their executive team. AMD, listed on the NASDAQ as AMD, is set to benefit from Keating's expertise in navigating government policies and regulations.

news.headline: Krystal Biotech updates on EMA's review of B-VEC for treating Dystrophic Epidermolysis Bullosa.
Broadridge introduces AI-powered algorithm insights for NYFIX on Dec 9, 2024, aiming to revolutionize algorithmic trading.
news.summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. (NYSE:BR) unveiled a groundbreaking AI-driven algorithm insights service for NYFIX in New York on December 9, 2024. This move aims to revolutionize algorithmic trading globally. The service is designed to provide real-time liquidity information, enhancing trading efficiency.

news.headline: NANOBIOTIX finishes Phase 1 study of NBTXR3 in pancreatic cancer at University of Texas MD Anderson.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, NANOBIOTIX disclosed the conclusion of the dose escalation and dose expansion phases of a Phase 1 trial investigating radiotherapy-activated NBTXR3 (JNJ-1900) for individuals with locally advanced pancreatic cancer (LAPC) or borderline resectable pancreatic cancer (BRPC). The Company, listed on Euronext as NANO and on NASDAQ as NBTX, is a late-clinical stage biotech firm specializing in nanoparticle-based therapies for cancer and other serious illnesses. The research is sponsored by The University of Texas MD Anderson Cancer Center.

news.headline: Huntington Bank appoints Christopher Wood to boost capital markets business, focusing on corporate investments and financing.
news.summary: In Columbus, Ohio on December 9, 2024, The Huntington National Bank announced the recruitment of Christopher Wood, an experienced professional in the industry. Wood's role will focus on expanding the financial institution's capital markets division, aiding corporate and sponsor-owned businesses in financing various strategic ventures such as investments and acquisitions. This strategic move is aimed at bolstering the bank's activities in facilitating transactions for companies.

news.headline: Verrica Pharmaceuticals granted new COO 950,000 stock options under Inducement Plan per Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4).
news.summary: West Chester, Pennsylvania - Verrica Pharmaceuticals Inc. disclosed that its Compensation Committee awarded its new Chief Operating Officer, David Zawitz, a nonqualified stock option for 950,000 shares of common stock under the Company’s Inducement Plan on December 9, 2024. This move was made to facilitate Mr. Zawitz’s recruitment to Verrica in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Verrica is a dermatology therapeutics firm dedicated to creating treatments for skin conditions necessitating medical attention.

news.headline: Charter Communications extends credit facilities maturities on December 3, 2024.
news.summary: Charter Communications, a company listed as CHTR on NASDAQ, based in Stamford, Connecticut, revealed in a recent press release that its subsidiary, Charter Communications Operating, LLC (CCO), signed an amendment on December 3, 2024. The specifics of the amendment were not disclosed, but it marks a significant development for the company and its operations.

news.headline: Compass Diversified (NYSE: CODI) to host investor day on Jan 16, 2025, in NY City at 9:30am ET.
news.summary: A company named Compass Diversified, known as CODI and listed on NYSE, will be hosting an investor day event on January 16, 2025, at 9:30am ET in New York City. The event will take place at Convene’s One Liberty Plaza location. This company is an owner of various middle market businesses.

news.headline: Zuora's Q3 2024: Revenue $116.9M, +6%, with subscription revenue $105.3M, +7%. GAAP Loss from Operations $11.7M.
news.summary: In Redwood City, California, Zuora, Inc. (NYSE: ZUO), a prominent monetization suite provider for modern businesses, revealed its financial performance for the fiscal third quarter concluding on October 31, 2024. During this period, the company reported noteworthy numbers for Fiscal 2025's third quarter results:- Subscription revenue saw a rise to $105.3 million, demonstrating a 7% increase compared to the previous year.- Total revenue surged to $116.9 million, reflecting a 6% increase year-over-year.- The GAAP loss from operations amounted to $11.7 million for this quarter.Overall, Zuora showcased growth in both subscription revenue and total revenue in the third quarter of Fiscal 2025, despite experiencing a loss from operations.

news.headline: MongoDB (NASDAQ: MDB) exceeded Q3 earnings expectations by 68%, reporting an EPS of $1.16.
news.summary: On Monday, December 9, 2024, MongoDB (NASDAQ:MDB) released its Q3 earnings after market close at 04:05 PM. The earnings report revealed that MongoDB exceeded expected earnings by an impressive 68.0%. The company reported an earnings per share (EPS) of $1.16, surpassing the estimated EPS. For the full story, interested individuals can find more information on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Lee Enterprises partners with ProRata.ai to enhance local news & ads - revolutionizing content delivery with AI. #News #Advertising #Partnership
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Lee Enterprises, Inc. (NASDAQ: LEE) from DAVENPORT, Iowa, revealed a groundbreaking collaboration with ProRata.ai, a pioneer in AI-driven technologies. This partnership signifies a significant advancement in tailored local content and instantaneous advertising solutions designed specifically for local and AI search engines. Lee Enterprises, a prominent provider of local journalism in the U.S., has taken this innovative step to enhance hyper-personalized user experiences.

news.headline: CÎROC launches 'Blue Dot Creative Residency' for emerging storytellers, providing financial capital, mentorship, and space for passion projects. NYC, Dec. 9, 2024.
news.summary: A recent initiative in New York has been launched to provide creatives with the necessary financial support, mentorship, and workspace to nurture their passion projects. This program aims to empower individuals in shaping the future culture by offering them the tools they need to succeed. The announcement was made on December 9, 2024, underlining the importance of providing creatives with resources in a competitive environment where dedication and resources play a crucial role in their success.

news.headline: VetsinTech trains over 2,000 military veterans in cybersecurity with help from Craig Newmark Philanthropies.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, in San Francisco, the prominent national non-profit group VetsinTech achieved a notable accomplishment by successfully providing training to more than 2,000 military veterans. VetsinTech focuses on assisting veterans in education, employment, and entrepreneurship through tech-related programs, solidifying their position as a key player in supporting veterans' professional development.

news.headline: Heritage Insurance Holdings authorizes $10M share repurchase program.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida on December 9, 2024, Heritage Insurance Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: HRTG) revealed a new share repurchase plan. The Board of Directors approved the plan with $10.0 million allocated for repurchasing shares. Heritage is identified as a super-regional property and casualty insurance holding company.

news.headline: IBM to hold Investor Day on Feb 4, 2025 in NYC at 1PM (ET). Event will be webcast live.
news.summary: Armonk, New York - On December 9, 2024, IBM disclosed plans regarding an upcoming Investor Day scheduled for Tuesday, February 4. This event will take place in New York City starting at 1:00 PM (Eastern Time). The Investor Day will be conducted in person and also webcast live for broader access. Interested parties can access the webcast and view it later through the Company's investor relations website. IBM, listed as NYSE: IBM, has called for this investor-focused event to provide insights and updates for stakeholders.

news.headline: BMO's Earl Davis expresses optimism on stocks, positive outlook for market.
C3 AI reports strong fiscal Q2 2025 results, 7th quarter of revenue growth. CEO impressed by performance.
news.summary: C3.ai, Inc. reported its fiscal Q2 results for the period ending October 31, 2024. The company, listed on NYSE as AI, showcased robust financial performance with significant revenue increase for the seventh consecutive quarter under the leadership of Chairman and CEO Thomas M. Siebel. The success was highlighted by strong top and bottom-line growth, emphasizing the growing revenue trend. Notably, the partnership between Microsoft and C3 AI holds immense potential for future opportunities.
